prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `7ec998c9`.
codex_response:
Implemented the ARC2 task package for `7ec998c9`. The rule is: keep the unique marker, draw a full blue vertical through its column, and add blue top/bottom arms; if the marker is in the exact center column, the top arm goes right and the bottom arm goes left, otherwise the top arm goes left and the bottom arm goes right. I discarded the summary hint because its column-parity claim is contradicted by the official 5x5 example; that correction is recorded in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_7ec998c9/notes.md#L1).

The package files are [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_7ec998c9/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_7ec998c9/verifier.py#L4), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_7ec998c9/generator.py#L8), and [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_7ec998c9/notes.md#L1). No new primitive was needed; `arc2/dsl_ext.py` was unchanged. The generator stays on-family by producing square single-marker grids with uniform background, middle-row marker placement, non-blue colors, and a mix of center-column and off-center cases matching the official family.

Verification/build status: official verifier passed `4/4`, generated verifier passed `1000/1000`, and the preview sheet looked consistent in a terminal sanity check. Artifacts are [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/7ec998c9/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/7ec998c9/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/7ec998c9/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/7ec998c9/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/7ec998c9/previews/preview_03.png).
